name: xiaoluo-code
description: XiaoLuo Code - 命令行AI编程工具

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = path.join(__dirname, 'src', 'gateway', 'pages'); const dest = path.join(__dirname, 'dist', 'gateway', 'pages'); if (!fs.existsSync(dest)) { fs.mkdirSync(dest, { recursive: true }); } const files = fs.readdirSync(src); files.forEach(file => { const srcFile = path.join(src, file); const destFile = path.join(dest, file); fs.copyFileSync(srcFile, destFile); }); console.log('Copied pages directory');"
